title: senecio phelleus
intro: Senecio phelleus, also known as False Germander, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming Senecio phelleus is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio phelleus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
